G

getAdministratorByName(String) - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Retrieves an administrator by name by calling the getAdministratorByName method with the provided name and returns the result.
getAdministratorByName(String) - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method retrieves an administrator from the database based on the provided name.

getAgeClient() - Method in class model.Client
 
getAllAdministrators() - Method in class controller.LoginController
Retrieves a list of all administrators by calling the getAllAdministrators method of the AdministratorDAO implementation and returns it.
getAllAdministrators() - Method in interface model.AdministratorDAO
Retrieves a list of all administrators by calling the getAllAdministrators method
getAllAdministrators() - Method in class model.DBImplementationAdministrator
This method retrieves a list of all administrators from the database.
getAllBookings() - Method in class controller.LoginController
Retrieves all bookings existing in the database.
getAllBookings() - Method in interface model.BookDAO
Retrieves a list of all current bookings in the database.
getAllBookings() - Method in class model.DBImplementationBook
Retrieves all bookings from the database.
getAllClient() - Method in class controller.LoginController
Retrieves a list of all clients by calling the getAllClient method of the ClientDAO implementation and returns it.
getAllClient() - Method in interface model.ClientDAO
Retrieves a list of all clients by calling the getAllClient method of the ClientDAO implementation and returns it.
getAllClient() - Method in class model.DBImplementationClient
Retrieves all clients from the database.
getAllCruise() - Method in class controller.LoginController
Retrieves a list of all cruises by calling the getAllCruise method of the CruiseDAO implementation and returns it.
getAllCruise() - Method in interface model.CruiseDAO
Retrieves a list of all cruises by calling the getAllCruise method of the
getAllCruise() - Method in class model.DBImplementationCruise
This method retrieves all cruises from the database by executing the SQLSELECTALL query and returns a list of Cruise objects representing the retrieved cruises.
getAllWorker() - Method in class controller.LoginController
Retrieves a list of all workers by calling the getAllWorker method of the WorkerDAO implementation and returns it.

getAllWorker() - Method in interface model.WorkerDAO
This method retrieves a list of all workers from the database.

Retrieves a client by calling the getClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns it.
